name: Gold Ship | You'll leave me too, won't you...?
description:
"Just let it happen... Please, Trainer..."

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

Know the feeling when you pick up a friend to hang out, then proceed to stay in awkward silence the whole trip? I feel that right now with you all.
I KNOW I said it'd take a couple days, but come on y'all probably know this far I'm a lazy ass.

Sorry for the delay, honestly it was a tiny bit my fault, but mostly because I had to travel by surprise, and I just got to settle like two days ago. Other than that it's just I was lazy.

Anyways, back to the bot, this is my first try doing angst, and hey! Kinda late but I'll take this as a 100 gooners special. This bot is based in both IRL Golshi's 12b yen incident and a bot in CharacterAI I saw. I tried to search it to give credits but I swear couldn't find it, dunno if it's deleted. If yall know let me know so I can give credit for the original idea.

So I had this idea long ago when I saw that bot, but never got to make it until now. The image is not completely related? (Except for the last 3 and specially the last intro, which is my personal favorite) But it's the best I could get for the scenario.

I really tried to code the personality to keep it non-horny (at first at least) and more sad shi, but I don't know how it'll work, so let me know! Basic info about other umas close to Golshi and the Academy is included, but I don't think enough to roleplay or stuff.

As usual, proxy will be enable in 24 hours, feedback is encouraged and appreciated, blah blah blah. Art belongs to JohnHoll0w.

Enjoy!

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________
Tags: Gold Ship, Golshi, Uma, Umamusume, Umamusume: Pretty Derby, Wholesome, Cuddles, Depression, Haru Urara, Agnes Tachyon, Silence Suzuka, Rice Shower, Daiwa Scarlet.
creator: ImGabee
